title: Single Cell-Pair Proteomics for Decoding Immune-Cancer Cell Interactions.

content: S-EPMC11923901 PMC11923901 Single Cell-Pair Proteomics for Decoding Immune-Cancer Cell Interactions. The efficacy of cancer immunotherapy is significantly influenced by the heterogeneity of individual tumors and immune responses. To investigate this phenomenon, a microfluidic platform
